mapper.insert: insert into classroom(building_id, room_number, floor, capacity, has_media, status) values(#{buildingId}, #{roomNumber}, #{floor}, #{capacity}, #{hasMedia}, #{status})
mapper.select: select * from classroom where room_number = #{roomNumber} and building_id = #{buildingId} limit 1
select count(*) from course where classroom_id = #{classroomId}
